hero.title:
I solve problems
by designing & building
hero.subtitle: Product designer and photographer crafting thoughtful, user-centered digital experiences that balance beauty with function.
projects.label: Work
projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.zbudget.title: zBudget
projects.zbudget.desc: A personal finance app built because Mint shut down — and my friends and I still needed to budget. Privacy-first, on-device budgeting with voice input and optional bank sync.
projects.photopal.title: Photo Pal
projects.photopal.desc: The all-in-one shoot planner for professional photographers. Track clients, gear, weather, travel times, golden hour, finances, and deliverables — all in one place.
projects.autosync.title: AutoSync
projects.autosync.desc: Effortless, real-time folder synchronization for macOS. Keep files perfectly in sync across drives, folders, and external storage — without thinking about it.
projects.grainify.title: Grainify
projects.grainify.desc: A film camera simulator for iPhone that brings the analog photography experience to your pocket. Load a roll from 9 meticulously recreated film stocks, shoot until it's full, then develop in a virtual darkroom.
projects.serverstatus.title: Server Status
projects.serverstatus.desc: A full-screen, auto-rotating server dashboard built for a small screen on your desk. Monitor CPU, memory, storage, and network in real time with glanceable widgets and instant visual alerts.
journey.label: Journey
journey.title: Where I've been
journey.role1.detail1: Drove automation initiatives migrating data from SAP R/3 to AWS S3, creating real-time PowerBI dashboards and reducing processing time by 85%.
journey.role1.detail2: Built data visualization systems using Power Automate and Power BI, saving 20+ hours per month. Directed cross-functional projects that cut hiring cycles from 30 days to 5. Led a company-wide Copilot demo showcasing practical AI applications.
journey.role2.detail1: Developed RPA solutions for customer support, cutting processing time by 80% and operational costs by 45%. Crafted go-to-market strategies that achieved a 15% rise in conversion rates within the first quarter.
journey.role2.detail2: Launched a personalized recommendation engine, increasing CTR by 65% and reducing early exits by 85%.
journey.role3.detail1: Designed and launched a gamified web-based platform for educating children about various industries and careers. Conducted extensive user research, identifying customer pain points and translating insights into actionable product improvements.
journey.role4.detail1: Designed and developed a React-based web app integrating fitness device data with an AI model supporting addiction rehabilitation, helping raise $1.1M in funding.
about.label: About
about.title: A bit about me
about.bio1: I'm Zian Meng — a product designer and builder based in New York. I've spent years at the intersection of technology and design, consulting for companies on automation and digital transformation, while pouring my creative energy into apps and experiences that feel human. I'm also a photographer who's shot campaigns for brands like JBL.
about.bio2: When I'm not shipping products, you'll find me behind a camera lens, chasing light and experimenting with film. That restless curiosity is why I build — I'm drawn to problems worth solving and products I actually care about using myself.
contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Let's build together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you.
